title: Breakwave Dry Bulk Shipping Report 7.9.2024
summary:
Main
Freight Futures Volatility Drops to 5-Year Lows as Spot Rates Remain Rangebound - Volatility has all but disappeared in the usually highly volatile freight futures market
Source: Breakwave Advisors

Dry Bulk Shipping
July 9, 2024
Breakwave Dry Futures Index: 1,983 Baltic Dry Index (spot): 1,940 Short-term Indicators:
↓ 30D: -1.9% ↑ 30D: 3.1% Momentum: Neutral
↑ YTD: 32.3% ↓ YTD: -7.4% Sentiment: Neutral
↑ YOY: 65.3% ↑ YOY: 92.3% Fundamentals: Negative
Bi-Weekly Report
• Freight Futures Volatility Drops to 5-Year Lows as Spot Rates Remain Rangebound - Volatility has all but disappeared
in the usually highly volatile freight futures market, as spot rates have remained relatively steady and any tightness
or slackness in the tonnage supply have so far appeared temporary in nature. Although spot rates are still at healthy
and mostly profitable levels, the lack of volatility is a worrisome sign, in our view. A

Bi-Weekly Report
• Freight Futures Volatility Drops to 5-Year Lows as Spot Rates Remain Rangebound - Volatility has all but disappeared
in the usually highly volatile freight futures market, as spot rates have remained relatively steady and any tightness
or slackness in the tonnage supply have so far appeared temporary in nature. Although spot rates are still at healthy
and mostly profitable levels, the lack of volatility is a worrisome sign, in our view.
